name: Ashes to Ashes
descs: Combat Start: if all enemies (or all Abnormality parts) have [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn', inflict 2 [Combustion] Potency on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).
Combat Start: inflict 2 [Combustion] Potency on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts) with [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn'.
Combat Start: inflict 3 [Combustion] Potency on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).
